div.h2: Kernel Teardown Order & State Validation Spec

ul.li: Teardown Order: Critical to unregister resources before unmapping memory.
Memory Safety: munmap must use the exact addresses/sizes from setup io_uring_params.
Kernel Sync: close(ring_fd) triggers final cleanup. If IORING_SETUP_IOPOLL is set, kernel threads are reaped here.
